name: Choco Peanut Butter Dream Cookies
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Quaker Oats (quick or old fashioned), uncooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, beat together brown sugar, peanut butter, and butter until light and fluffy.
3. Blend in water, egg, and vanilla; mix in the combined dry ingredients until well incorporated.
4. Shape dough into 1-inch balls and place on an ungreased cookie sheet.
5. Flatten each ball to about 1/4 inch thick with the bottom of a glass dipped in sugar.
6. Bake for 8-10 minutes, or until edges are golden brown. Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack.
7. In a heavy saucepan over low heat, melt chocolate pieces and vegetable shortening until smooth.
8. Spoon about half a teaspoon of melted chocolate onto each cookie and sprinkle with chopped nuts.
9. Allow the cookies to chill until set before storing in an airtight container. Makes 6 dozen.
